description: Log in to Moodle (admin/Admin1234!) at http://localhost/. Create a new grading scale named "Clinical Competency Scale" with the values "Not Yet Competent, Developing, Competent, Proficient, Expert" and the description "Scale for assessing clinical nursing competencies". In the "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101) course, create an assignment named "Lab Skills Assessment" that uses this "Clinical Competency Scale" for grading.

metadata.expected_scale_values: Not Yet Competent, Developing, Competent, Proficient, Expert
